DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT INGRID & ISABEL LLC'S MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR A PROTECTIVE ORDER IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO TURN OVER ANY MATERIALS OR COPIES OF MATERIALS FROM MS. CARNEY'S PERSONAL JOURNAL. PLAINTIFF IS FURTHER PROHIBITED FROM USING THE INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THE JOURNAL FOR ANY PURPOSE. FURTHER, ANY INFORMATION OR DISCOVERY DERIVED EXCLUSIVELY FROM USE OF THE JOURNAL IS PROHIBITED FROM USE BY PLAINTIFF FOR ANY PURPOSE. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO TIMELY RETURN THE JOURNAL TO MS. CARNEY TWO YEARS AGO AMOUNTS TO CONVERSION OF THAT PROPERTY. DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (302/LMG) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; NOT REPORTED
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-09-2011 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

Notice And Motion To Compel Resumption And Completion Of Ingrid Carney
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Off Calendar

Mtn For Evidentiary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT INGRID & ISABEL LLC'S MOTION FOR EVIDENTIARY SANCTIONS AND FOR PROTECTIVE ORDER.
Appearances: Richard M. Rogers of the Law Office of Richard M. Rogers (981.9788) for plaintiff and responding party; Lindsey Connor Hulse of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP (438.5932) for defendant and moving party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion for a protective order is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to turn over any materials or copies of materials from Ms. Carney's personal journal. Plaintiff is further prohibited from using the information contained in the journal for any purpose. Further, any information or discovery derived exclusively from use of the journal is prohibited from use by plaintiff for any purpose. Plaintiff's failure to timely return the journal to Ms. Carney two years ago amounts to conversion of that property. Defendant to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2011 Continued To Sep-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT INGRID & ISABEL, LLC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - SUSTAIN WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO SUBSTANTIVE OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
